title: Code Agents under Split Specifications: Corpus, Oracle, Frozen Runs, and Reproduction Harness
description: Research artifact for the paper Code agents under split specifications: an empirical study of silent failure in cross-organizational integration (Journal of Systems and Software, under review). Includes the 24-task bilateral integration corpus (self-validating), the deterministic execution oracle (no model-based evaluation), the 7-condition experiment harness, the frozen run of 5,208 units across 7 models (five local open-weight 2B–14B and two frontier systems), the pre-registered predictions with deviation log, and an analysis pipeline that regenerates every number in the paper offline (seeded bootstrap; byte-identical reproduction via reproduce.sh).
